content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian completely accepted this inheritance.

This inheritance is very simple, and there is very little knowledge involved, but if there is no such inheritance, he will not know how to impact and become the existence of the Supreme Dao Realm, maybe he can try it slowly, but it will undoubtedly delay for a long time.

Now.

Through this inheritance, Ye Tian finally knew why those Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Domain failed to attack the Dao Realm, and they fell one by one, and none of them survived.

First of all, the way they attacked was wrong, and even the Origin Ancestor did not find the right way.

It's not that their cultivation path is wrong, it's that they don't have enough accumulation, they don't have enough foundation, and they are not qualified to impact to the Dao realm, and forcibly attacking will naturally fail.

And just as Ye Tian guessed, first of all, you must comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, if you don't even comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, then it is naturally impossible to break through successfully, even if there is an infinite secret medicine, it is the same.

The Infinite Secret Elixir can only be increased to an eighty percent chance when the breakthrough conditions are met.

In addition to the rules of the Supreme Dao, it is also necessary for the physical body or origin to reach a certain level, if the physical body is not strong enough or the origin is not strong enough, then if you forcibly break through, you will definitely fail.

In addition, there is also a need for a secret technique dedicated to breakthroughs, which can draw on the power of the origin to reshape the physical body and break through.

It can be said that the most important thing is the secret art of the Supreme Dao.

And this kind of Supreme Dao Secret Technique needs to be created by the Supreme Dao Secret Text, and the Supreme Dao Secret Text is a inheritance knowledge monopolized by all major forces, and ordinary casual cultivation cannot get the Supreme Dao Secret Text at all.

Of course, if there is no secret text of the Supreme Dao, if you forcibly break through, it is not impossible to break through, but the success rate may only be 1 in 10,000, or even lower.

The rules of the Supreme Dao, the secret text of the Supreme Dao, the physical body or the origin meet the conditions, and this is the knowledge that impacts the Dao realm.

Of course, you can also increase the success rate of breakthroughs with the help of foreign objects, such as things like the Infinite Secret Elixir.

The inheritance that Ye Tian purchased was worth tens of thousands of Dao Coins, naturally it was not just a few words, it still included six Dao Secret Texts, but it was just a very ordinary Six Dao Secret Texts, at least it made people feel that these tens of thousands of Dao Coins were not in vain.

"I'll go, this inheritance of knowledge is a real pit!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

It took a lot of nine awakenings to awaken almost all of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord's worth, and just obtained this bit of information, there is no way to break through to the Supreme Dao Realm, which is undoubtedly very unworthy, but knowledge is priceless.

If he didn't have enough to buy, he wouldn't know how to hit the Dao realm.

Overall, it's not too much of a loss.

......

"Six Supreme Dao Secret Texts are too few, I'm afraid you need a lot of Supreme Dao Secret Texts before you can hope to create a Supreme Dao Secret Technique that will help you break through. If I want to break through to the Supreme Dao realm, I must at least collect a lot of Supreme Dao Secret Texts, or directly obtain a Supreme Dao Secret Technique. Ye Tian thought so.

But in a short period of time, he estimated that he would not be able to obtain such a supreme secret technique.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Liujin Giant City, but not long after he left the Liujin Giant City, he found that the void had changed.

His area has been cordoned off.

Immediately after, a breath permeated the air.

In an instant, the six Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords surrounded Ye Tian.

"What do you mean by how many?"

Ye Tian asked.

"You bid on the Supreme Dao Inheritance at auction, right?"

One of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords said coldly.

"Yes, but I have already accepted the inheritance, and this inheritance can only be passed on once, if you want it, I can't give it!" Ye Tian said lightly.

These six Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords naturally knew this, and there was no surprise in the slightest.

However, their goal is not to pass on the supreme path.

They knew very well that even if they had obtained the inheritance, they had no hope of becoming a supreme realm powerhouse.

"Dongguang, we have inquired about you, not long ago, you were the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who awakened six times, but now you have become the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who has awakened eight times. Moreover, he also obtained a large number of treasure resources in a short period of time, otherwise he would not be able to bid for the Supreme Dao inheritance. You must have gained a great opportunity, otherwise it would be impossible to raise your cultivation to the eighth-time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord so quickly. Hand over your chance, and we may let you go!"

"If not, then die here!"

Rumble!!!!

The six Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords all took out their Quasi-Dao weapons, exuding a powerful aura all over their bodies.

Any one of them placed in the Reincarnation Domain could be comparable to the top Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, or even more powerful, after all, their weapons were better.

But for Ye Tian, even if it was this replica body, it could still easily kill them.

"You're really going to die!"

Rumble!

Ye Tian took out his own weapon, the spear, and the rules of the Supreme Dao permeated out.

Immediately after, he cast the Heavenly Poke and also performed the Supreme Dao Flow Body Technique, how fast the speed was.

"Not good!"

They recognize that something is wrong.

An eight-time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord had actually comprehended the Supreme Dao Rules, which was too unexpected for them.

In addition to the top geniuses, the ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Eternity would not be able to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao!

It's so hard to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao!

That is to say, the Infinite Domain is rich in resources, and it is easy to improve, if they go to the land of eternity, they will not even be able to step into the Origin Realm, let alone become the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

So, their talent is really spicy chicken.

It was precisely because of his spicy chicken that he was shocked to see Ye Tian so against the sky.

Burst!

Ye Tian's Heavenly Piercing easily pierced through the body of one of them, instantly hitting it hard.

"Withdraw from the formation, run away!"

One of them shouted.

However.

Ye Tian fought with all his strength to attack them, and the light of the Heavenly Poke pierced through their bodies, allowing them to resist with various treasures, and they were all pierced one by one.

The gap in strength between each other is too big, and they can't stop it at all.

After a while, a Nine-Time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord was killed by Ye Tian.

But.

Ye Tian's strength in this copied body was still too bad, allowing three of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords to use the secret treasure to escape, and he couldn't catch up for a while.

"If it's me who copies my real body, I can wipe them out in an instant!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, after they escaped, a little publicity, at least they would save themselves a lot of trouble, and the ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords would not dare to provoke themselves.
